name: document subject with synthesized canonical-shape id recovers to existing NPC via role fuzzy-match

source.purpose: Playthrough 8 produced a dual-entity bug: Mara existed as npc_4 (Mara Vostin) but the Archivist anchored a document subject to the synthesized id 'npc_fled_resonant', which never existed in the registry. The phantom anchor failed to resolve and got drift-flagged. The downstream effect was the Narrator's prose treating Mara-as-fled and Mara-as-hidden as separate people (turn 3: 'two dead, one hidden, one fled' — counted Mara twice). The resolver fallback added in apply-patch.ts now fuzzy-matches synthesized canonical-shape ids against existing NPCs' role+retrievalCue. Unambiguous matches resolve; ties or no-match return null.

npc_4.name: Mara Vostin
npc_4.role: Resonant; fled settlement; made contact with Undrift networks
npc_4.retrievalCue: The fled Resonant the settlement is hiding via Undrift contact.

narrator.prose: Corvin pulls up the registry entry on the terminal.

payload.title: Mara Vostin departure registry entry
payload.authorizes: Records Mara Vostin as classified expended three months prior
payload.original_summary: Mara Vostin classified expended; Departure Method: Registry Transfer; Authorization: Synod Dispatch Authority
